arts.ttl: Tonight's Cardiff City news as Riza holds talks with player, Norwich City 'bottled it' and star out until January
arts.sum: The latest Bluebirds news from Cardiff City Stadium

arts.ttl: Bird finds his wings in new position at Bristol City as Manning discusses competition for places
arts.sum: “It’s having certain profiles in certain positions that allow us to bring our qualities so when you haven’t got Twine playing, someone that’s terrific between the lines, you might now with Birdy playing there. “He’s definitely someone that, in terms of goal contributions, is going to continue to get better and better over the course of the season mainly because of the quality that he’s got.”
Tom McGarry has provided a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship this weekend.

arts.ttl: Fassnacht starts: Norwich City team news and predicted XI to face Bristol City
arts.sum: The latest Norwich City team news as Johannes Hoff Thorup's side gear up to face Bristol City in the Championship. The post Fassnacht starts: Norwich City team news and predicted XI to face Bristol City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Norwich flyer Sainz scoops second consecutive player of the month award
arts.sum: Norwich City winger Borja Sainz has been crowned by the EFL as Championship player of the month for a second consecutive time.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning previews “difficult” Bristol City trip to Norwich City and sheds light on injuries
arts.sum: Bristol City head coach Liam Manning has looked ahead to what he believes is an “extremely difficult” away trip to face Norwich City at Carrow Road on Saturday. The game is sandwiched in-between the previous game, which saw the Robins’ unbeaten run come to an end, and the November international break and so provides a big opportunity to instantly respond to defeat and send fans and players away from Championship action in high spirits.

arts.ttl: Norwich City vs Bristol City predictions: Robins can snatch a point
arts.sum: Alex Jack reckons Norwich and Bristol City could play out a draw when they meet in the Championship this weekend.
